title: Fulfillment promises under delivery capacity
prompt: At the start of a service window, an operator chooses how many same-day order slots to expose in each zone. Courier-hours are limited and later demand is uncertain. The formulation prices lost margin and overtime but contains no customer-lifetime-value term. Frame a credible capacity trade-off without adding loyalty benefits.

model_specification.mathematical_objective: maximize expected same-day margin minus overtime cost
model_specification.mechanism: Exposed slots shape accepted load; realized spatial demand determines capacity use and overtime.
